mapper.select:
SELECT , (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlist_song WHERE playlist_id = p.id) AS song_count FROM playlist p
AND p.name LIKE CONCAT('%',#{name},'%') AND p.status = #{status} ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC, p.create_time DESC

SELECT p.id,p.name,p.cover,p.description,p.status,p.sort_order,p.create_time,p.update_time, (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM playlist_song WHERE playlist_id = p.id) AS song_count FROM playlist p WHERE p.status = 1 ORDER BY p.sort_order ASC, p.create_time DESC
SELECT p.id,p.name,p.cover,p.description,p.status,p.sort_order,p.create_time,p.update_time FROM playlist p WHERE p.id = #{id}
mapper.update: UPDATE playlist name = #{name}, cover = #{cover}, description = #{description}, status = #{status}, sort_order = #{sortOrder}, WHERE id = #{id}
mapper.select: SELECT id, playlist_id AS playlistId, song_id AS songId, sort_order AS sortOrder FROM playlist_song WHERE playlist_id = #{playlistId} ORDER BY sort_order ASC
